hero.title: Overlord Anime Wiki
hero.description: A dark fantasy isekai about Momonga becoming Ainz Ooal Gown after YGGDRASIL ends, then leading Nazarick through conquest, politics, and the Sacred Kingdom arc.

gameFeature.title: Overlord Anime Overview
gameFeature.description: Dark fantasy isekai following Momonga as he becomes Ainz Ooal Gown, leading Nazarick through conquest, political intrigue, and the Holy Kingdom campaign.

overlordWatchOrder.title: Anime Overlord Watch Order
overlordWatchOrder.intro: Start with all four TV seasons, then place The Sacred Kingdom between Season 4 Episodes 7 and 8. The two 2017 recap films are optional and can be skipped without missing any new story.

steps.title: Overlord Season 1 — Start Here
steps.description: Introduces Momonga, Nazarick, Carne Village, the Momon identity, and the Shalltear conflict. 13 episodes, aired July–September 2015.

steps.title: Overlord: The Undead King (Optional Recap)
steps.description: A theatrical recap of the first part of Season 1. Watch only if you want the movie format. Not a replacement for the full series.

steps.title: Overlord: The Dark Warrior (Optional Recap)
steps.description: Second recap film covering Season 1 material. Best treated as bonus viewing after you already know the core story.

steps.title: Overlord II — Continue the Story
steps.description: The Lizardmen campaign, Sebas in the capital, and the growing clash between Nazarick and the human world. Episodes 14–26.

steps.title: Overlord III — Empire and War
steps.description: Covers the Empire alliance, Workers invasion, and the decisive battle at Katze Plains. Episodes 27–39, aired July–October 2018.

steps.title: Overlord IV Episodes 1–7 — Before the Movie
steps.description: Watch the Sorcerous Nation opening arc and Dwarven Kingdom material first. Stop after episode 7 (episode 46 overall) to place the movie correctly.

steps.title: Overlord: The Sacred Kingdom — Canon Movie
steps.description: This is a canon story film, not a recap. It adapts the Holy Kingdom arc and fits chronologically between Overlord IV Episode 7 and Episode 8. Released September 2024, streaming on Crunchyroll from April 2025.

steps.title: Overlord IV Episodes 8–13 — Finish Season 4
steps.description: Return to the TV run for the Re-Estize Kingdom endgame and the closing events of Season 4. Episodes 47–52.

quickTips: The two 2017 films (The Undead King, The Dark Warrior) only recap Season 1 — skip them if you want pure story progress.
The Sacred Kingdom is a canon story film, not a recap — it counts as new content and should be watched in its correct chronological position.
If you finish Season 4 first, you can still watch The Sacred Kingdom after — just note you will see Ainz's motivation slightly out of order.
All four TV seasons and The Sacred Kingdom are available on Crunchyroll.

overlordCharacters.title: Anime Overlord Main Characters
overlordCharacters.intro: These are the core Nazarick members, major kingdom figures, and movie cast that appear most often in searches. Knowing which faction each character belongs to makes the story arcs far easier to follow.

cards.name: Ainz Ooal Gown
cards.description: Formerly Momonga, now ruler of the Sorcerer Kingdom. Every major political and military arc centers on his decisions and strategy.

cards.name: Albedo
cards.description: Guardian Overseer and Ainz's chief administrator. She manages Nazarick's internal command structure and is fiercely loyal to Ainz.

cards.name: Demiurge
cards.description: Floor Guardian of the seventh floor and Nazarick's strategic mastermind. A hidden force behind many of the series' largest plot movements.

cards.name: Shalltear Bloodfallen
cards.description: Guardian of the first to third floors. She drives one of the anime's most memorable early conflicts and remains one of Nazarick's strongest fighters.

cards.name: Neia Baraja
cards.description: Squire and core viewpoint character in The Sacred Kingdom film. One of the most searched movie-era characters due to her pivotal role.

cards.name: Remedios Custodio
cards.description: Grandmaster of the Holy Kingdom Paladin Order. She leads the desperate resistance against Jaldabaoth in The Sacred Kingdom film.

cards.name: Renner
cards.description: Princess of Re-Estize whose hidden intelligence and agenda become increasingly important in later political arcs, especially around the kingdom's fall.

cards.name: Climb
cards.description: Renner's loyal bodyguard who gives the kingdom side of the story its most personal viewpoint and is tightly tied to Renner's fate.

overlordEpisodeGuide.title: Anime Overlord Episode Guide by Season
overlordEpisodeGuide.intro: Overlord has four TV seasons with 13 episodes each, totaling 52 episodes. Each entry below shows the episode range, release window, and main story focus for that block.

items.name: Overlord Season 1
items.description: Momonga becomes Ainz Ooal Gown, Nazarick enters the New World, Carne Village is saved, Momon is established, and the Shalltear showdown closes the season. Aired Jul–Sep 2015.

items.name: Overlord II
items.description: The Lizardmen campaign, Sebas in the capital, and the widening conflict between Nazarick, adventurers, and human factions. Aired Jan–Apr 2018.

items.name: Overlord III
items.description: Empire and Workers invasion material, major Carne Village developments, and the catastrophic battle at Katze Plains that reshapes the New World. Aired Jul–Oct 2018.

items.name: Overlord IV
items.description: The Sorcerer Kingdom era through diplomacy, the Dwarven Kingdom arc, and the final destruction of Re-Estize. In chronological order, The Sacred Kingdom fits between episodes 46 and 47. Aired Jul–Sep 2022.

overlordSacredKingdom.title: Anime Overlord: The Sacred Kingdom Guide
overlordSacredKingdom.intro: The Sacred Kingdom is the only Overlord film that tells a major new canon story instead of recapping TV material. It expands the world beyond Nazarick and Re-Estize by focusing on the Holy Kingdom under siege.

solutions.name: Where It Fits in the Watch Order
solutions.description: Place this film after Overlord IV Episode 7 and before Episode 8 for chronological order. It released in Japan on September 20, 2024 and began streaming on Crunchyroll in April 2025.

solutions.name: Main Setup
solutions.description: The Roble Holy Kingdom faces collapse from Jaldabaoth and a demi-human alliance. Remedios Custodio and Neia Baraja travel to request help from Ainz and the Sorcerer Kingdom.

solutions.name: Key New Characters
solutions.description: Neia Baraja (viewpoint character), Remedios Custodio (paladin leader), Calca Bessarez (Holy Queen), Kelart Custodio (high priestess), and CZ2128 Delta with an expanded role.

solutions.name: Why It Matters
solutions.description: It gives the Holy Kingdom arc its own full adaptation and adds context to Ainz's reach beyond Re-Estize, making it essential for post-Season-4 watch guidance seekers.

managementTips: This film is a canon story, not a recap — it is essential for Holy Kingdom arc fans.
Can also be watched after the full series as a standalone conclusion to the Holy Kingdom story.
Streaming on Crunchyroll alongside the main TV series.
Neia Baraja becomes one of the fan-favorite characters introduced in the film era.

overlordAinz.title: Anime Overlord: Ainz Ooal Gown
overlordAinz.intro: Ainz Ooal Gown is the face of Overlord — former player Momonga, now the Sorcerer King of Nazarick. His identity, titles, magic, and story arc across the anime and The Sacred Kingdom film define every major event in the series.

cards.name: Core Identity
cards.description: Formerly Momonga, a dedicated YGGDRASIL player known as Suzuki Satoru in the real world. He remains logged in as servers shut down and awakens in the New World as the undead Overlord Ainz Ooal Gown.

cards.name: Titles and Public Personas
cards.description: Ainz carries multiple titles: Supreme One, Sorcerer King, King of Darkness, and Momon the Dark Hero. Each persona serves a distinct political or strategic role across different arcs.

cards.name: Race and On-Screen Presence
cards.description: He appears as an undead Overlord — a skeletal figure in a black academic robe with gold and violet trim and a floating red orb beneath his ribs. His former race was human.

cards.name: Magic Profile
cards.description: Specialized in necromancy and instant-death magic with over 700 spells available. Super-tier abilities include Fallen Down and Iä Shub-Niggurath, and he exploits time-stop timing for devastating combinations.

cards.name: Position in Nazarick and the World
cards.description: Revered as the highest of the Forty-One Supreme Beings by Nazarick's NPCs. Outside, he becomes the Sorcerer King and a major political force whose influence reshapes the entire New World.

cards.name: Story Progression
cards.description: Begins as the last player at YGGDRASIL's shutdown, establishes the Sorcerer Kingdom from Nazarick, and becomes a world-shaping power in the Holy Kingdom arc covered in The Sacred Kingdom film.

overlordAlbedo.title: Anime Overlord: Albedo Character Guide
overlordAlbedo.intro: Albedo is Guardian Overseer of the Great Tomb of Nazarick, supervising all seven Floor Guardians. Her design, unwavering loyalty to Ainz, and political role make her one of the most searched characters in the Overlord series.

regions.name: Core Role
regions.description: Albedo supervises the seven Floor Guardians and ranks above all other Nazarick NPCs. She also serves as Prime Minister, handling internal affairs and management during Ainz's absence.

regions.name: Race, Family, and Creator
regions.description: A demon succubus created by Tabula Smaragdina. She is the middle sister — Nigredo is her older sister, Rubedo is her younger sister.

regions.name: Design and Presence
regions.description: Jet-black hair, golden eyes with vertically split pupils, black wings, and curved horns. Her white dress in standard scenes transforms into heavy black full plate armor when she enters battle.

regions.name: Personality and Loyalty
regions.description: Intensely loyal to Ainz with emotional possessiveness and occasional jealousy. Her mix of obsession and administrative competence makes her one of the most compelling characters in the series.

regions.name: Power Profile
regions.description: Highest defensive power among all Nazarick NPCs, especially when wearing Hermes Trismegistus. She can transfer received damage to her armor and withstand a Super-Tier Magic spell with her defensive skill.

regions.name: Administration and Equipment
regions.description: Among the top three NPCs in intelligence. Manages Nazarick's internal operations and is connected to key systems including the World Item Ginnungagap and the 3F weapon.

overlordShalltear.title: Anime Overlord: Shalltear Bloodfallen
overlordShalltear.intro: Shalltear Bloodfallen is the Floor Guardian of Nazarick's first through third floors and one of the series' strongest combatants. Her iconic Season 1 conflict against Ainz remains one of the most searched arcs in the Overlord anime.

creatures.name: Core Identity
creatures.description: A true vampire and Floor Guardian of floors 1–3, created by Peroroncino. Her residence is listed as the Adipocere Chamber on the 2nd floor of the Great Tomb.

creatures.name: Design and Visual Hook
creatures.description: Silver hair, crimson eyes, pale skin, and a black dress in standard appearance — switching to blood-red full plate armor when fully equipped for combat.

creatures.name: Personality
creatures.description: Proud and flirtatious with a short fuse when things go wrong. She takes her Guardian duty with full seriousness while her volatile confidence drives some of the anime's most dramatic scenes.

creatures.name: Combat Reputation
creatures.description: The strongest Floor Guardian excluding Gargantua, with the highest overall stats among standard Guardians. Ainz himself considers her the best one-on-one fighter in Nazarick.

creatures.name: Battle Utility
creatures.description: Combines life-sustaining abilities, the most actual combat experience of any Floor Guardian, confirmed divine magic casting, and a class build especially effective against certain magic-caster types.

creatures.name: Defining Story Arc
creatures.description: Brainwashed by a World Item and turned against Nazarick, she is defeated by Ainz in one of the anime's signature battles. She is then resurrected and continues as a key Floor Guardian.

overlordFloorGuardians.title: Anime Overlord Floor Guardians Ranked
overlordFloorGuardians.intro: The Floor Guardians are the most powerful defenders of the Great Tomb of Nazarick. This overview ranks them by role, combat specialty, and commonly discussed strength order — from raw dueling power to strategic command value.

items.name: Shalltear Bloodfallen
items.description: Widely regarded as the strongest Floor Guardian in direct one-on-one combat, with the highest overall stats among standard Guardians. Ainz considers her the best single-target fighter.

items.name: Mare Bello Fiore
items.description: Strongest area-of-effect caster in Nazarick, built for army-scale destruction and long-range magic pressure. A top-two combat contender alongside Shalltear.

items.name: Cocytus
items.description: Four-armed insectoid warrior with the greatest attack power when using weapons. His strict honor code makes him one of Nazarick's premier warrior-types.

items.name: Demiurge
items.description: The strategic mastermind of Nazarick with a jack-of-all-trades combat toolkit. His deception, administration, and planning make him irreplaceable in large-scale operations.

items.name: Aura Bella Fiora
items.description: Excels in speed, beast taming, and guerrilla warfare. She becomes significantly more dangerous when operating with summons, terrain advantages, and team support.

items.name: Albedo
items.description: Highest defensive power among Nazarick NPCs. Her value comes from absurd defense, control, and survivability, making her a top-tier pick in sustained engagements.

overlordNazarick.title: Anime Overlord: Nazarick Explained
overlordNazarick.intro: The Great Tomb of Nazarick is a 10-floor dungeon complex and the home base of Ainz Ooal Gown. It was built by a guild of 41 players in YGGDRASIL and now serves as the political and military center of the Sorcerer Kingdom.

sections.name: Floor Structure
sections.description: Nazarick has 9 standard floors plus a 10th floor housing Ainz's throne room, the graveyard garden, and the Pleiades. Each floor has a dedicated Guardian and distinct environment.

sections.name: The Floor Guardians
sections.description: Seven elite guardians oversee the floors. They are among the most powerful beings in the New World and loyal to Ainz by design and dedication.

sections.name: The Pleiades Battle Maids
sections.description: An elite force of six battle maids stationed on the 9th floor as a final defense line. Each specializes in a different combat style.

sections.name: The Sorcerer Kingdom
sections.description: Ainz eventually establishes the Sorcerer Kingdom with Nazarick as its capital, expanding the tomb's influence into open diplomacy and territorial control.

overlordStoryArcs.title: Anime Overlord Story Arcs Overview
overlordStoryArcs.intro: Overlord organizes its story into distinct arcs, each focusing on a different conflict or political development. This overview maps each arc to its anime season and main conflict.

priorities.name: Shalltear Bloodfallen Arc
priorities.description: Ainz confronts a mind-controlled Shalltear in a high-stakes duel that establishes the true danger of outside enemies and the limits of Nazarick's security.

priorities.name: Lizardmen Arc
priorities.description: Cocytus leads an assault on the Lizardman tribes. The arc explores Nazarick's military strategy and introduces the lizardman community as lasting characters.

priorities.name: Sebas Arc
priorities.description: Sebas investigates a human trafficking ring in the capital, raising complex questions about loyalty, morality, and Nazarick's relationship with human society.

priorities.name: Workers Invasion Arc
priorities.description: Mercenary adventurers hired to plunder Nazarick meet a catastrophic end, demonstrating the absolute gap between Nazarick and even elite human fighters.

priorities.name: Katze Plains Battle
priorities.description: A massive war between the Empire and the Kingdom ends with Ainz deploying overwhelming magic, reshaping the political balance of the New World permanently.

priorities.name: Re-Estize Kingdom's Fall
priorities.description: The Sorcerer Kingdom's campaign against Re-Estize concludes the longest-running human political storyline in the series with decisive finality.

overlordTimeline.title: Anime Overlord Story Timeline
overlordTimeline.intro: This timeline organizes the major events of the Overlord anime in chronological order, including where The Sacred Kingdom film fits relative to Season 4.

achievements.title: Arrival in the New World
achievements.description: Momonga remains in YGGDRASIL as servers shut down and awakens in the game world as Ainz Ooal Gown with Nazarick fully intact.

achievements.title: Carne Village and Momon Identity
achievements.description: Ainz rescues Carne Village and establishes the adventurer identity Momon to explore the New World and gather intelligence.

achievements.title: Lizardmen and Capital Operations
achievements.description: Nazarick absorbs the Lizardman tribes and Sebas conducts operations in the capital, expanding Nazarick's reach and reputation across the continent.

achievements.title: Katze Plains Massacre
achievements.description: Ainz uses catastrophic magic to end a large-scale war, establishing himself as a world-altering force feared across all nations of the New World.

achievements.title: The Sacred Kingdom Crisis
achievements.description: Between Season 4 Episodes 7 and 8, the Holy Kingdom arc unfolds as depicted in The Sacred Kingdom film, placing Ainz's influence into the Holy Kingdom.

achievements.title: Fall of Re-Estize
achievements.description: The Sorcerer Kingdom's final campaign against Re-Estize concludes the kingdom's story arc with decisive and permanent consequences for the New World.

overlordLightNovel.title: Anime Overlord Light Novel Reading Order
overlordLightNovel.intro: The Overlord light novels by Kugane Maruyama are the source material for the anime. This guide helps anime viewers know where to start and what the novels add beyond the TV adaptation.

faqs.question: Where should I start reading after finishing the Overlord anime?
faqs.answer: If you have watched all four TV seasons and The Sacred Kingdom film, you can pick up the light novels from Volume 15 onward for completely new story content. Volumes 1–14 roughly cover Seasons 1–4 plus the movie arc.

faqs.question: Do the Overlord novels start from the beginning?
faqs.answer: Yes. Volume 1 covers Season 1 content. If you want the full novel experience from the start, begin with Volume 1 and read through sequentially.

faqs.question: How many Overlord light novel volumes are there?
faqs.answer: The main Overlord series has 17 volumes in Japanese as of early 2025. English translations by Yen Press are available in print and digital formats.

faqs.question: Does the Overlord anime skip content from the novels?
faqs.answer: Yes. The anime condenses many scenes and side details from the novels. Volume 9 (Lizardmen arc) and Volume 14 (Holy Kingdom arc) are particularly expanded in the novel versions.

overlordAnimeVsNovel.title: Anime Overlord: Anime vs Light Novel Differences
overlordAnimeVsNovel.intro: The Overlord anime adapts the light novels closely but skips background details, side perspectives, and lore explanations that the novels develop in depth. This guide highlights the main differences viewers ask about.

faqs.question: What does the Overlord anime skip compared to the light novels?
faqs.answer: The anime removes extended side-character perspectives, background lore on magic systems, and detailed battle explanations. The light novels also expand on world politics and NPC inner thoughts that the anime condenses.

faqs.question: Is the Overlord anime a faithful adaptation?
faqs.answer: Generally yes in terms of major plot beats and character arcs. The story structure follows the novels closely. The differences are mainly in depth, pacing, and the amount of supplementary lore included.

faqs.question: Which Overlord arc benefits most from reading the novels?
faqs.answer: The Lizardmen arc in Season 2 and the Holy Kingdom arc in The Sacred Kingdom both gain significant additional context in the novels. Volume 14 in particular adds depth to Neia Baraja's perspective.

faqs.question: Does the Overlord anime change any major story outcomes?
faqs.answer: No major plot outcomes are changed. Character motivations and world details receive more space in the novels, but the anime follows the canon story faithfully.

overlordVoiceCast.title: Anime Overlord Voice Cast Guide
overlordVoiceCast.intro: The Overlord anime features a prominent Japanese cast with an English dub added for Seasons 1–4 and The Sacred Kingdom film. This guide lists the key voice performers for major characters.

settings.name: Ainz Ooal Gown
settings.description: English dub by Chris Guerrero. Hino portrays both Ainz's commanding public presence and the quiet internal monologues of the former Momonga.

settings.name: Albedo
settings.description: English dub by Jill Harris. Hara's performance balances Albedo's fierce loyalty, administrative precision, and moments of comedic intensity.

settings.name: Demiurge
settings.description: English dub by Ben Bryant. Katou's voice gives Demiurge a smooth, theatrical quality that matches his genius strategist persona.

settings.name: Shalltear Bloodfallen
settings.description: English dub by Felecia Angelle. Uesaka captures both Shalltear's unsettling elegance and her occasionally childlike reactions.

settings.name: Neia Baraja
settings.description: New cast member for The Sacred Kingdom film. Her performance anchors the Holy Kingdom perspective as the main viewpoint character for the movie.

overlordSoundtracks.title: Anime Overlord Soundtracks and Theme Songs
overlordSoundtracks.intro: Overlord's music spans four TV seasons and a theatrical film. The openings and endings each reflect the tone and arc of their respective season, with OxT and Myth & Roid as the most recognized contributors.

entries.title: Clattanoia — Season 1 OP (OxT)
entries.description: High-energy opening that establishes the series' dark action tone and introduces Ainz's rise to power.

entries.title: L.L.L. — Season 1 ED (Myth & Roid)
entries.description: Slower, haunting ending theme that became one of the most recognized pieces in the Overlord franchise.

entries.title: Go Cry Go — Season 2 OP (OxT)
entries.description: Hard rock opening with aggressive energy matching the Lizardmen and capital arcs of Season 2.

entries.title: Voracity — Season 3 OP (Myth & Roid)
entries.description: Season 3 opening that emphasizes Nazarick's growing power and the escalating scale of Ainz's campaign.

entries.title: HOLLOW HUNGER — Season 4 OP (OxT)
entries.description: Season 4 opening reflecting the darker, more politically complex final chapter of the TV series.

entries.title: The Sacred Kingdom Original Score
entries.description: Theatrical film score composed for the Holy Kingdom arc, expanding the series' orchestral range for the big-screen adaptation.

overlordSeason5News.title: Anime Overlord Season 5 News
overlordSeason5News.intro: Overlord Season 5 has not been officially announced as of early 2026. This page tracks confirmed announcements from official channels and explains what the source material position means for any future continuation.

steps.title: Current Official Status
steps.description: No Season 5 has been announced by Kadokawa, Madhouse, or any affiliated production committee. The most recent major production was The Sacred Kingdom film released in September 2024.

steps.title: Light Novel Source Position
steps.description: The Overlord light novels have 17 volumes in Japanese. The anime and film have adapted through approximately Volume 14. Volumes 15–17 contain unadapted material that could serve as a Season 5 foundation.

steps.title: Where to Watch for Official News
steps.description: Official announcements come through the Overlord anime official website (overlord-anime.com) and the official Twitter account @over_lord_anime. Crunchyroll also posts licensing announcements for western distribution.

steps.title: 10th Anniversary Activity
steps.description: The 10th anniversary of the Overlord anime was marked in 2025. Anniversary events sometimes precede new production announcements, but no official continuation has been confirmed from this period.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Common questions about the Anime Overlord wiki and the Overlord anime series

questions.question: What is Anime Overlord about?
questions.answer: Anime Overlord covers the Overlord anime series — a dark fantasy isekai where Momonga, a YGGDRASIL player, becomes Ainz Ooal Gown and leads the Great Tomb of Nazarick in the New World through conquest and political intrigue.

questions.question: What is the correct Overlord anime watch order?
questions.answer: Watch all four TV seasons first, then place The Sacred Kingdom film between Season 4 Episode 7 and Episode 8 for chronological order. The two 2017 recap films are optional and can be skipped without missing new story content.

questions.question: How many seasons does Overlord have?
questions.answer: Overlord has four TV anime seasons totaling 52 episodes. There are also three films: two recap compilations from 2017 and the 2024 canon film Overlord: The Sacred Kingdom.

questions.question: Is Overlord: The Sacred Kingdom a recap film?
questions.answer: No. The Sacred Kingdom is a canon story film that adapts the Holy Kingdom arc from the light novels. It is not a recap and fits chronologically between Overlord IV Episodes 7 and 8.

questions.question: Where can I watch Overlord anime?
questions.answer: All four TV seasons and The Sacred Kingdom film are available on Crunchyroll. The series is also available through other licensed streaming platforms depending on your region.

questions.question: Will there be an Overlord Season 5?
questions.answer: As of early 2026, no Season 5 has been officially announced. The light novels have volumes beyond what the anime has adapted, and no official production has been confirmed yet.

novels.whatIsDescription: The Overlord light novel series by Kugane Maruyama is the source material for all anime seasons and films, with content beyond the current adaptation.

whySteps.step1Description: Volumes 15-17 cover story content not yet adapted into anime
whySteps.step2Description: The novels expand on character motivations and world-building the anime condenses
whySteps.step3Description: Understand scenes and references the anime abbreviates

news.title: Overlord News
news.description: Latest official news and announcements for the Overlord anime franchise.
news.metaTitle: Overlord Anime News - Season 5, Film Updates & Official Announcements
news.metaDescription: Official Overlord anime news covering Season 5 status, film releases, streaming announcements, and anniversary events.
news.whatIsDescription: Official announcements, streaming release news, anniversary events, and production updates for the Overlord anime franchise.

whySteps.step1Description: Stay current on any official Season 5 announcement from the production committee
whySteps.step2Description: Know when new Overlord content lands on Crunchyroll and other platforms
whySteps.step3Description: This section covers confirmed announcements, not speculation or rumors
